name: period cramp
title: best herbal teas for period cramp
description: Cimicifuga racemosa tea contains bioactive constituents such as ferulic acid, dihydroferulic acid, and lignans that help to alleviate period cramp pain. The tea's anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties also contribute to its ability to ease menstrual cramps. To make the tea, steep 1 teaspoon of dried Cimicifuga racemosa root in 8 ounces of boiling water for 5-7 minutes, then strain and drink.
